message:
🌱 Add kong: luarocks not able to install luaossl (or any) packages with mission (#1533)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kong-14598-luarocks-not-able-to-install-luaossl-or-any-packages-with-latest-kong",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kong: luarocks not able to install luaossl (or any) packages with latest kong images",
+    "description": "luarocks not able to install luaossl (or any) packages with latest kong images. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kong deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kong version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nhelm list -n kong 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kong installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kong configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kong configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl get configmap -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kong\n```\n### Is there an existing issue for this?\n\n### Kong version (`$ kong version`)\n\nkong 3.8, kong 3.9, kong 3.10\n\n### Current Behavior\n\nPul any kong image."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for luarocks not able to install luaossl (or any) packages with…",
+        "description": "### Summary\n### Issue reference\n\nFix #14598\n```yaml\nWarning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://luarocks.org: Error loading file: [string \"/var/cache/luarocks/https___luarocks.org/mani...\"]:202027: main function has more than 65536 constants\nWarning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rocks-moonscript-org/moonrocks-mirror/master/: Error loading file: [string \"/var/cache/luarocks/https___raw.githubusercon...\"]:202027: main function has more than 65536 constants\nWarning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://loadk.com/luarocks/: Error loadin\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl get events -n kong --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"luarocks not able to install luaossl (or any) packages with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/Kong/kong/pull/14621",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Warning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://luarocks.org: Error loading file: [string \"/var/cache/luarocks/https___luarocks.org/mani...\"]:202027: main function has more than 65536 constants\nWarning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rocks-moonscript-org/moonrocks-mirror/master/: Error loading file: [string \"/var/cache/luarocks/https___raw.githubusercon...\"]:202027: main function has more than 65536 constants\nWarning: Failed searching manifest: Failed loading manifest for https://loadk.com/luarocks/: Error loading file: [string \"/var/cache/luarocks/https___loadk.com_luarock...\"]:202020: main function has more than 65536 constants\n\nError: No results matching query were found for Lua 5.1.\nTo check if it is avai",
+        "# To fix the current LUA issue https://github.com/luarocks/luarocks/issues/1797\nRUN curl -LO https://luarocks.org/manifests/daurnimator/luaossl-20220711-0.rockspec\nRUN luarocks install luaossl-20220711-0.rockspec OPENSSL_DIR=/usr/local/kong CRYPTO_DIR=/usr/local/kong",
+        "#20 0.710 Warning: Failed searching manifest: Failed downloading https://luarocks.org/manifest-5.1 - no downloader tool available, please install wget or curl in your system\n#20 0.710 \n#20 0.710 Error: Could not satisfy dependency kong-redis-cluster ~> 1.5.5-0: No results matching query were found for Lua 5.1.\n#20 0.710 Missing dependencies for kong-plugin-upbit-middleware 0.5.0-1:\n#20 0.710    kong-redis-cluster ~> 1.5.5-0 (not installed)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+  },
